world.comment: World size in px. 4-player square layout max. Duel mode uses the same center-focused battlefield with only two opposite spawns.

camera.comment: Initial camera zoom (Pixi scale). Lower = see more map.

bots.comment: Max AI players in solo. Bots re-evaluate every thinkIntervalSeconds.

city.comment: Energy = city HP. At 150 energy, growth ~3.5/min. cityAttackTargets=2 is used by city defense logic; cityAttackDamage=5 punishes unprotected scouts.

fighter.name: Корвет
fighter.comment: ABILITY-ONLY. Reserved for summons and special events rather than the core shipyard roster.

destroyer.name: Эсминец
destroyer.comment: CORE T1. Mainline ship and default opener. Reliable pressure, moderate range, and the cheapest permanent core unit.

cruiser.name: Крейсер
cruiser.comment: CORE T2. Mid-game control ship. Longer range, stronger area pressure, and the main answer to stacked lines.

battleship.name: Линкор
battleship.comment: CORE T3. Slow siege anchor for decisive pushes and center breaks. Strong but expensive.

hyperDestroyer.name: ГиперЛинкор
hyperDestroyer.comment: RESERVED. Not part of the current core roster; kept only for legacy/special content while the game is trimmed to 3 main ship classes.

mines.comment: Normal mine = 0.4 resource/sec and 0.1 energy/sec. Rich mine = x2. Mines remain the main source of map control and economy.

eCredits.comment: 200 lets players open immediately with destroyers. Economy remains mine-driven.

turret.comment: Border turrets. Base damage is boosted; multishot now belongs to patrols instead of turrets.

formation.comment: Visual formation grid. Mixed types: destroyers front, cruisers mid, battleships rear.

terrain.comment: Zone shape: 96 rays, each stepped by 2px until influence budget depleted.

nebula.comment: Gameplay-neutral backdrop only. Nebulae are now visual background layers with parallax and do not affect combat or movement.

waterBonus.comment: Cities near water grow faster. Threshold: 40% water tiles in zone.

xp.comment: xpNext = 160 + 16 * level * 1.05. Level 5 needs ~244 XP. Level 10 needs ~328 XP.

map.comment: FBM noise map generation. landThreshold controls land/water ratio.

fog.comment: Three fog states: unseen (near-black), seen (dim), visible (clear).

blackHole.comment: 3 min cooldown. 17s total (3s grow + 10s hold + 4s fade). R=400px. Pulls and damages units.

chainLightning.comment: Laser bounces to nearby enemies within 60px, losing 25% per bounce.

fireEffect.comment: 3 dmg/sec for 3s = 9 total bonus damage per hit.

combat.comment: Squad-first combat. engageRangeFactor controls start-of-fight contact, zoneJoinRadius expands nearby squads into the same battle, and disengage/regroup keeps post-battle recovery stable without auto-resuming generic move orders.

movement.comment: Movement/collision constants. minPersonalDist=16: units push apart if closer. separationPush=0.5: gentle repulsion.

formations.comment: Squad-first formations. formationCooldown=2.0 enforces max full-recalc frequency. facingLerpSpeed=3.0 rad/s for smooth rotation. steeringRadius=40 for enemy avoidance.
